TLS 1.3 detection: X25519Kyber768 (Chrome 0x11ec), X25519Kyber768Draft00 (Cloudflare 0xfe31/0x6399), NIST ML-KEM drafts (0x2001-0x2010) via custom ClientHello/ServerHello supported_groups and key_share extension parser. QUIC detection via TLS-in-QUIC handshake parsing. IKE/IPsec via nDPI classification. PQC flags bitmask tracks KEM presence, signature presence, hybrid negotiation, offered-only, and session resumption states. No nDPI patches required for SSH/TLS PQC extraction.
primary_platforms: Linux (AF_PACKET live capture, PCAP offline); macOS (PCAP offline). Dependencies: CMake 3.16+, libpcap, nDPI 4.11+. Systemd service template included for 24/7 production monitoring.
target_industries: Enterprise, Financial Services, Government, Healthcare, Any (privacy-preserving passive monitoring suitable for regulated environments)
product_brief: Privacy-preserving passive network analyzer detecting PQC algorithm usage in TLS; SSH; and QUIC traffic. Analyzes flow metadata only (no payload storage). Provides organization-wide quantum readiness visibility without network disruption. Free open-source alternative to commercial passive probes.
